tear_toilet_paper_and_hand_it: A toilet paper roll is kept in the middle of the desk infront of the robot. The robot places its left hand on the top of the toilet paper roll to hold it still and uses its right hand to tear off a piece of toilet paper from it and hands the paper to a person
pick_up_a_bottle_and_hand_it: the robot uses its left hand to pick up a bottle kept in the middle of the desk infront of it and hand it to a person
pick_up_a_football_and_hand_it: the robot uses both its hands to grab the left and right ends of a football kept in the middle of the desk infront of it, lifts it up and places it in the palm of a person
pick_up_basketball_from_a_person_and_dro: The robot grabs the basketball from a person using both hands and then drops it on the black chair in the front
shake_hand_with_a_person: The robot stretches its left hand and shakes hands with a person in the front
shake_a_bottle_of_protein_powder: the robot recieved a bottle of protein shake from a person using its left hand and then shake the protein up and down 2 two times and hand it back to the person
pick_up_a_football_and_put_in_a_containe: use both hands to pick up a football from a person and place it into a container beneath
hand_over_flower: Use the left hand to pick up the rose and passes it to a human.
hand_over_duck_toy_g1: Walk towards the purple front door and then stop to grab the black handle.
handover_dumpling_g1: Use the left hand to take the pink dumpling toy on a person's hand and put it on the desk.
walk_towards_the_cabinet_and_close_the_c: The robot walks towards an open cabinet and lifts its left hand to push the door towards the right to close it.
walk_towards_the_desk_and_use_an_air_pum: The robot walks towards a desk on which an air pump is kept in the middle. It lifts it up and holds it with its left hand and uses its right hand to compress it by pushing its handle inwards.
walk_towards_a_desk_and_pick_up_a_bottle: The robot walk up to a desk on which a bottle is kept on the left hand side and a container is kept on the right hand side. The robot uses its left hand to pick up the bottle and places it in the container.
walk_towards_a_desk_and_place_a_cube_on_: The robot walks towards a desk on which a file tray is kept in the middle and a cube is kept to its right. The robot lifts the cube using its right hand and places it on the file tray.
walk_towards_a_desk_and_place_a_stapler_: The robot walks towards a desk on which a file tray is kept in the middle and a stapler is kept to its right. The robot lifts the stapler using its right hand and places it on the file tray.
walk_towards_a_desk_and_place_a_toilet_p: The robot walks towards a desk on which a file tray is kept in the middle and a toilet paper roll is kept on its right. The robot uses its right hand to hook on finger in the gap of the roll and grabs it, lifts it and places it on the tray.
walk_towards_a_desk_and_drag_the_file_tr: The robot walks towards a file tray kept in the middle of a desk and uses its right hand to grab a tray and pulls it out towards itself
walk_towards_a_desk_and_put_the_eraser_i: The robot walks towards a desk on which an eraser is kept on the left hand side and a container is kept on the right hand side. The robot picks up the eraser using its left hand and places it in the container.
walk_towards_a_desk_and_put_the_shovel_i: The robot walks towards a desk on which a shovel is kept on the left hand side and a container is kept on the right hand side. The robot picks up the shovel using its left hand and places it in the container.
walk_towards_chair_and_rotate_the_chair: the robot walks towards a chair and uses its right hand to push it from the side in an anticlockwise direction to rotate it
hold_a_whiteboard_and_walk_with_it: the robot uses its right hand to hold the edge of the whiteboard and walks forward in a straight line
walk_towards_elevator_and_push_button: the robot walks towards an elevator and uses its right hand finger to press the down button
walk_towards_trashbin_and_throw_trash_in: the robot walks towards the trash can and uses its left hand to grab the trash lying on trashcan and throw it inside
walk_towards_fire_extinguisher_and_close: the robot wallks towards the fire extinguisher and uses its left hand to push the door to the right and close it
walk_towards_fire_extinguisher_and_open_: the robot walks towards the fire extinguisher and use its right hand to push the door to the left and open it
walk_towards_chair_and_push_it_in: the robot walks towards a chair and uses both its hands to grab it and push it away from itself
walk_towards_chair_and_pull_it_out: the robot walks towards a chair to grab it and pulls it towards itself
walk_towards_coffee_maker_and_close_lid: a coffee maker is kept on a small desk and the robot walks towards it and uses its right hand to push down the lid of the coffee maker to close it
walk_towards_a_desk_and_pick_up_a_dumpli: The robot walks towards a table in front, picks a dumpling toy with left hand and puts it in an orange round plate
walk_towards_a_desk_and_pick_up_a_shampo: The robot walks towards a table in front, picks a shampoo with left hand and puts it in a small grey container
walk_towards_a_desk_and_place_a_bottle: the robot picks up a bottle from a person using its left hand and walk towards the table in frontand put the bottle on the table.
walk_towards_a_desk_and_pick_up_a_pencil: the robot walk towards a table in front and pick up a black pencil case on the left hand side and put the pencil case into a small container on the right hand side
walk_towards_a_desk_and_pick_up_a_tennis: the robot walk towards a table in front and uses its left hand to pickup a tennis ball on the left side and put it in a container on the right hand side
walk_towards_a_desk_and_pick_up_the_boil: the robot walk towards a table in front and uses its left hand to pick up the pot from the base and places it on the table
walk_towards_a_desk_and_pour_water_from_: the robot walk towards a table in front and uses its left hand to pick up the pot from the base and pour water to the cup on the right hand side
walk_towards_a_desk_and_turn_on_the_boil: the robot walk towards a table in front and click the button on the base of the boilling pot using its left middle finger
walk_towards_a_desk_and_push_the_file_tr: the robot walk towards a table in front and then pushes a layer of a file tray back to its original position using its right hand
walk_towards_a_desk_and_turn_on_the_ligh: the robot walk towards a table in front and then clicks the light switch button using the right hand's index finger
walk_towards_outside_chair_and_pull_it_o: A chair is kept outside and the robot walks towards it to grab it and pull it out towards itself
walk_towards_a_duster_on_desk_and_clean_: The robot walks towards a desk kept outside and uses its right hand to up pick up the grey duster kept on it and uses it to clean the table by swiping it twice
walk_towards_a_open_gate_button_and_open: The robot walks towards an open gate button and uses its right fist to press it and open the gates
walk_towards_a_stanchion_and_retract_the: The robot walks towards a pair of stanchion kept in front of it and uses the right hand to grab on the strap of the right stanchion that is being connected to the left stanchion. After removing it from the stanchion on the left, it releases the strap and lets it retract back to the stanchion on the right.
pick_up_a_plate_and_put_it_into_the_sink: pick up a plate using the right hand and walk towards the sink and put it inside
place_kettle_near_coffee_maker: pick up a kettle on a counter using the right hand and walk towards another counter and put the kettle near the coffee maker
pick_up_football_and_walk_towards_anothe: pick up a football using both hands and turn around and walk towards another desk and put it on the desk
throw_away_a_piece_of_paper_to_trashcan: pick up a piece of paper from the table and walk towards the trash can and throw it into compost
walk_towards_table_organize_table_top: The robot walks towards a desk kept outside and uses its right hand to pick up two emotional support dumplings one after the other and puts it in a container kept in front of it on the desk
pick_up_a_magnetic_container_turn_around: the robot uses its right hand to pick up the magnetic container kept in the middle of the desk and turn leftwards and walk towards the whiteboard and extend the right arm to stick the container on it
pick_up_a_duster_turn_around_walk_toward: the robot uses its right hand to pick up the grey duster kept on the edge of the round table outside, turn around and walk towards the square table and place the duster in a container kept on the middle of the desk
pick_up_a_dumpling_toy_turn_around_walk_: the robot uses its right hand to pick up the emotional support dumpling kept on the square table outside, turn around and walk towards the round table and place it in middle of the desk
pick_up_a_caution_sign_stand_and_walk_to: the robot uses its right hand to pick up a caution sign board kept on the stair and turn around and walk towards a pillar and place the sign against it
pick_up_a_kettle_place_it_on_base_and_tu: pick up a kettle using the right hand on left side of the counter and then walk right towards the kettl base and turn on the kettle
clean_the_plate: walk towards the tissue paper container and pull out a piece of tissue paper and use it to wipe the plate
pack_a_lunch_box: pick up a rubric cube, an apple, a tennis ball, a soft toy, a bottle from the table and put it into the lunch box one by one
organize_chess_pieces: using the right hand to place 3 different shape and weight chess pieces into a small container
clean_the_window: pick up a grey duster using the right hand and walk towards the window and then clean the window using the duster
walk_to_grab_the_door_handle: The robot walks towards the door handle and put its right hand on it and twist the handle
remove_a_soldering_gun_from_its_base_h1: the robot uses its right hand to grab the soldering gun kept on the middle of the table and pulls it out of its base and keep it on the right side of the base
pour_sunflower_seeds_on_plate_g1: the robot uses its right hand to pick up a bag of sunflower seeds kept in the middle of the desk and tilts it over a plate kept next to it to pour out a few seeds and then puts the bag of seeds back on the desk
remove_a_soldering_gun_from_its_base_g1: Use the left hand of the robot to grab the soldering gun kept on the middle of the table and pull it out of its base and keep it on the left side of the base
pour_water_from_a_kettle_into_a_cup: the robot uses its right hand to lift up a kettle kept on the middle of the desk by its handle and tilt it into a glass kept next to it to pour out water
use_the_hammer: A hammer is kept on the right hand side and a pillow is kept on the left hand side on the desk infront of the robot and the robot uses its right hand to pick up the hammer and makes a downward swinging motion to hit the pillow
use_a_garden_tool: A garden tool is kept on the righthand side and a container is kept on the lefthand side on a desk infront of the robot. the robot uses its right hand to pick up the garden tool and makes a scooping motion inside the container
use_the_hole_punch: a hole pucnch is kept on the middle on the desk infront of the robot and the robot uses both its hands as fists to press on it and use it
wipe_a_monitor_with_a_cloth: the robot uses its right hand to pick up the cloth kept in the middle of the desk and use it to wipe the monitor in the middle of the desk by swiping its screen twice
wipe_a_table_with_an_eraser: the robot uses its right hand to hold the eraser kept in the middle of the desk and use it to wipe the desk by swiping its surface twice
remove_soil_from_box: the robot uses its right hand to pick up the hammer kept on the middle of the desk and make a downward swinging motion to hit the desk
erase_a_table_g1: the robot uses its right hand to hold the cloth kept in the middle of the desk and use it to wipe the desk by swiping its surface twice
clean_a_table_with_duster: the robot uses its right hand to pick up the duster kept in the middle of the desk and use it to wipe the desk by swiping its surface twice
clean_a_table_with_eraser: the robot uses its right hand to hold the eraser kept in the middle of the desk and use it to wipe the desk by swiping its surface twice
click_a_keyboard_key: The robot uses its right fingers to click on the space key of the black keyboard placed on the center of the white desk.
click_a_mouse: The robot uses its right fingers to click on the left button of the black mouse placed on the table.
use_a_duster_to_dust_the_desk: A grey duster is placed on the desk near the right hand side and the robot uses the right hand to grab the duster's handle and dust the desk frrom right to left to right.
use_a_soft_sponge_to_wipe_off_a_dry_surf: A soft sponge is kept on the balc marked spot on the table infront of the robot and it uses its right hand fist to press down on it and drrags it across the table in a back and forth manner twice to clean it
use_a_whiteboard_eraser_to_erase_the_mar: A whiteboard eraser is kept on the black marked spot on the table infront of the robot and the robot uses its right hand to swipe it back and forth on the table twice to clean it
pick_the_hammer_and_hit_desk: The robot picks the hammer with right hand and hits the black area on the desk and places it back.
use_eraser_to_wipe_desk_g1: Use the left hand to press on the green eraser and wipe the desk from center to the left and then back to center.
